commands.review_summary:
The PR removes temporary dependency-registry cleanup Convex functions/tests, adds a ClawHub migration-cleanup skill, updates AGENTS.md migration guidance, and relaxes the `.agents/skills` ignore allowlist.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a cleanup PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection confirms the merge result removes the dependency-registry cleanup entry points.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to decide whether the recorded production apply output is sufficient to remove the cleanup path without post-apply verification.

target.title: chore: remove dependency registry cleanup
target.body:
## Summary

- Remove the one-off dependency-registry scan cleanup functions now that production apply completed.
- Remove the associated maintenance tests/mocks for that temporary cleanup path.
- Add the repo-local `create-and-cleanup-migration` skill and simplify `.gitignore` so `.agents/skills` is not allowlist-gated.
- Add durable `AGENTS.md` guidance for Convex migrations/backfills and cleanup-code removal.

## Migration Lifecycle Evidence

Implementation PR: #2573
Merged SHA: `23edf7d19d199272aa126ebd1eda3c05b166d774`
Backend deploy run: https://github.com/openclaw/clawhub/actions/runs/27227433388
Deployment: `wry-manatee-359`

Production apply completed with:

```json
{
  "isDone": true,
  "stats": {
    "cacheRowsDeleted": 953,
    "cacheRowsScanned": 953,
    "skillRowsMatched": 3,
    "skillRowsPatched": 3,
    "skillRowsScanned": 85701,
    "staticScansMatched": 367,
    "staticScansRewritten": 367,
    "versionRowsMatched": 36780,
    "versionRowsPatched": 36780,
    "versionRowsScanned": 219473
  }
}
```

Post-apply verification was intentionally not completed in this cleanup PR per operator direction; this PR removes only the already-run temporary maintenance surface.

## Validation

- `bun run format:check -- .gitignore AGENTS.md convex/maintenance.ts convex/maintenance.test.ts .agents/skills/create-and-cleanup-migration/SKILL.md`
- `bunx vitest run convex/maintenance.test.ts`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bunx convex codegen`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
target.author: patrick-erichsen
